text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At last, Grass Wonder is set to make her debut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In contrast to the anxiety I feel, she appears
completely undisturbed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She heads for the track, ready to do business as
usual.
